Package request

  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    ClearRequest
    Deletes all the data from the database, including user accounts, auth tokens, and generated person and event data
    EventIDRequest
    Returns a single Event object of a specified ID
    EventRequest
    Returns ALL events for ALL family members of the current user (current user is found by the auth token)
    FillRequest
    Populates the server's database with generated data for the specified user name
    LoadRequest
    Clears all data from the database (just like clear) and loads the posted user, person, and event data into the database
    LoginRequest
    Logs in the user
    PersonIDRequest
    Returns the single person object with the specified ID
    PersonRequest
    Returns ALL family members of the current user (user is taken from the auth token)
    RegisterRequest
    Creates a new user account, generates 4 generations of ancestor data for the new user, logs the user in and returns an auth token.
